reviews.review_description: Hi im bread im a trial admin and tbh this game is the most fun game ever  you get over like 4 mod menus and they are all cool and also theirs a iistupid mod menu and every mod works

The game is so fun when you get free mods, they should add more songs and makes me and people kill me using them so many platforms but I’m just pretty good at the game. This is actually fun and the people help you if you’re new to the game and the company is very nice and I like the cosmetics, but you should add like trust that you are and that and like add more cosmetics like at least try to make it and never go inside but at least it’s pretty good. It’s one of my favorite updates even though I played gorilla tag I’m actually good at this game. If I could’ve read it a whole different I waited 1 million.

It says I need to have the latest version to play online when everything is up to date. My friend who just got the game completed tutorial and then got the same thing. I don’t get it please fix.                                                                                 I did play before this happened though and loved it so I would like to keep playing
Ok i was a admin in this game and lost it but now play it or dont its ur choice best game ever oat MOMKEY IS A SIGMA DEV FRFR
